text: GymFit is a modern fitness club built around the motto 'Train hard. Live strong.' We offer state-of-the-art equipment, world-class coaches, and a supportive community. GymFit has over 5,000 active members, 40+ weekly classes, 25 expert coaches, and 24/7 gym access.
GymFit is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week (Mon-Sun, Open 24/7). Members get secure keycard entry and can train any time of day or night. 24/7 access is included with the Pro and Elite plans.
GymFit is located at 123 Fitness Avenue, Downtown, CA 90210. You can reach us by phone at +1 (555) 123-4567 or by email at hello@gymfit.com. Follow us on Instagram for updates.
The Starter plan costs $29 per month. It includes full gym access, 2 group classes per week, locker room access, and the GymFit fitness app. It is the best entry-level option for new members.

The Pro plan costs $49 per month and is our most popular membership. It includes everything in Starter, plus unlimited group classes, 1 personal training session per month, a nutrition plan, and 24/7 gym access.

The Elite plan costs $89 per month. It includes everything in Pro, plus weekly personal training sessions, recovery and sauna access, and priority class booking. It is our premium all-inclusive membership.
All GymFit plans come with a free 7-day trial. There are no hidden fees and you can cancel anytime. Membership pricing is simple and honest: Starter $29/mo, Pro $49/mo, and Elite $89/mo.
GymFit offers a free 7-day trial on any membership plan. New members are welcome. To start your free trial, choose a plan on the website or contact the front desk at hello@gymfit.com.

To join GymFit, pick a membership plan (Starter, Pro, or Elite) and start your free 7-day trial. You can sign up on the website using the Join Now or Start Free Trial buttons, or visit us at 123 Fitness Avenue, Downtown, CA 90210.
GymFit memberships can be cancelled anytime with no cancellation fees and no long-term contract. If you want to cancel or pause your membership, contact us at hello@gymfit.com or +1 (555) 123-4567.
Strength & Conditioning class: Build raw power with guided lifting and progressive overload. Suitable for all levels. Led by certified GymFit coaches.
HIIT Burn class: High-intensity interval training to torch calories and boost endurance. Recommended for intermediate members.
Yoga & Mobility class: Improve flexibility, balance, and recovery with mindful flows. Suitable for all levels and great for active recovery days.
Boxing class: Sharpen your reflexes and power through technical pad and bag work. Great for beginners and up (Beginner+).
Spin Cycle class: Ride to the rhythm in our high-energy indoor cycling studio. Suitable for all levels.
CrossTraining class: Functional full-body workouts that build real-world strength. Designed for advanced members.

GymFit runs over 40 group classes every week led by certified trainers. Available classes include Strength & Conditioning, HIIT Burn, Yoga & Mobility, Boxing, Spin Cycle, and CrossTraining. Group classes are included (2 per week on Starter, unlimited on Pro and Elite).

Personal training at GymFit is one-on-one coaching with a certified trainer. The Pro plan includes 1 personal training session per month, and the Elite plan includes weekly personal training sessions. Additional sessions can be arranged at the front desk.
GymFit has 25 expert coaches. They are certified trainers who build personalized plans, teach classes, and keep you accountable to reach your goals.

GymFit facilities include premium machines and free weights that are maintained and upgraded regularly, locker rooms, and (on the Elite plan) recovery and sauna access. Every membership includes access to the GymFit fitness app.
GymFit offers nutrition support including in-app meal guidance and one-on-one coaching to fuel your progress. A personalized nutrition plan is included with the Pro and Elite memberships.

Why choose GymFit? Expert certified coaches, 24/7 access with secure keycard entry, modern well-maintained equipment, and nutrition support. More than a gym, GymFit is a community built to help you become the strongest version of yourself.
